summary:
Claim: Post-auricular nodes are not part of Waldeyer’s lymphatic chain.  
Evidence: - Waldeyer’s ring encompasses lymph nodes around the oropharynx, including those near the tonsils and base of tongue. - Post-auricular nodes lie externally, draining scalp and neck skin, and are part of the cervical lymphatics, not the oropharyngeal ring.  
Answer: D
